query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_registration,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.incident_location,
  LEFT(c.incident_description, 250) AS incident_desc,
  c.status,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE c.incident_description IS NOT NULL 
  AND c.incident_description != ''
  AND c.incident_description NOT LIKE '%Test incident%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
